entry.title: Re: BTP forms service vs onPrem Adobe Forms
entry.content: Hello, The BTP Forms service is a cloud service hosted on SAP BTP. It can be used as an alternative to ADS based on SAP Netweaver system. So in terms of difference, you can save on a system landscape installation/maintenance. Ofcourse you can still use the Adobe Lifecycle Designer in conjunction with BTP Forms service as per documentation in https://help.sap.com/docs/forms-service-by-adobe/sap-forms-service-cf/using-adobe-livecycle-designer. Hope this helped. Regards, Kishan

entry.title: Re: S4HANA Public Cloud_Order confirmation form_change output is not triggering automatically
entry.content: Please remove tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

entry.title: Re: Alert notification in SAP S4/HANA public cloud and SAP BTP
entry.content: Added Manufacturing tag. Please remove other tags.

entry.title: Holiday on a non planned working day
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
How can I setup a time valuation to process hours on a public holiday that occurred on a day employees are not planned to work?
Requirement : Employees should be paid for all holidays even if they are not scheduled to work on the holiday.

Using the standard paid holiday time type group only generates hours for weeks which the employees are scheduled to work. But does not generate any hour for a non-work day holiday.

I have created a time valuation that filters the holidays, but I am not sure what the input time type group should be. I tried to use the recorded working time but it generates 0hr on non - work public holidays, since employees do not record hours on those days.


SAP Timesheet SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking HCM Time Management SAP Payroll and Time Change Management SAP Payroll and Time Change Management HCM (Human Capital Management)

entry.title: Scope Item not selectable in Central Business Configuration
entry.content:
Good morning experts, please help me, in SAP Central Business Configuration (CBC), I do not have available to add the Scope Item 1GP, why?

I am doing the Define Scope activity.

DDA

CBC

Thank you for your attention, I await your comments.

entry.title: CSV lookup using CPI
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have a CSV on an SFTP server that contains Employee's ID and their date of birth. Is it possible to do a lookup in CSV from CPI? E.g. send EmployeeID as request and get date of birth as a response.

I know I can create another iflow that reads this CSV regularly into a hashmap and do lookup there. However, I was trying to configure this ina single iflow, if possible.

 

Thanks,

entry.title: I need to convert the BUOM from KG to ML.
entry.content: Sap will not accept decimals or hundred thousand mls as it wants a comma space and will not accept the last zero ie: we purchase 380mls, PART ABC is in KG. the conversions we need is either 380000 mls to 1KG or 380mls to 0.38kg. How do I fix this without creating a new part. We have the 100 EC to 38KG conversion in the table but vendor invoices in mls

entry.title: How to activate CLT in several created projects is possible

Good morning, experts

Good morning, experts

Can you tell me if it is possible to activate CLT for several projects created in CBC (Central Business Configuration), or it has some restriction.

If the answer is YES, why I can not assign in the Deployment Target option the Customizing option, the button is disabled.

We are in the group of countries not localized by SAP, for this reason we must activate the CLT functionality.

We are from Ecuador

Attached images

Deployment Target

Thank you for your attention, I await your comments.

entry.title: Re: SAM 2310 : After attaching debugger Simulator shows Blank Screen
entry.content: Might help if you describe the debugging method. Are you using MDK debugger or Nativescript debugger? What does your launch.json look like?

entry.title: How to change destination path in BFC CONSO Development
entry.content:
After sending the objects from BFC DEV PARAM to BFC DEV CONSO, we scan the objects in CONSO. But the destination path from "scan objects" is redirected to Production BFC. Please let us know where and how to change the destination path in BFC.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to change destination path in BFC CONSO Development
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Please follow these steps:

Tool - > General Options -> Transfer -> Transfer Vectors -> Network -> Configure...

Enter the new path in the Network Configuration.

 

Now your scan tasks will scan the new path.

Best Regards,

Timtouna

entry.title: Create URL Attachment on Maintenance Order using BAPI ABAP
entry.content:
Hi need your help,

my requirement is to create/update maintenance order using custom program and create/update URL attachment as well, i have been searching for a while and i can't find any BAPI to help me create URL attachment at all.

Previously i tried BAPI BDS_BUSINESSDOCUMENT_CRE_O_URL  but it could only create attachment as text not URL, what i really need it URL attachment, whereby when user view list attachment they can directly click and redirect to browser to view the web page.

Please help...

entry.title: SOLMAN RFC READ ROLE
entry.content:
We have noted some discrepancies between our copy of the READ role and the SAP Standard version. I compared the release notes/log from 

I did some analysis and these are the two auth objects/values that we lose if we overwrite our role with the standard role which are undocumented.

SAP_SOLMAN_READ_702 

S_ADMI_FCD – Missing NADM

S_SDCC_ADD – Missing WRITE

 

ZS:SM:SAP_SOLMAN_READ_702

 

S_ADMI_FCD – Has NADM

S_SDCC_ADD – Has WRITE

Were these auths removed from SAP Standard READ RFC role at some point and not documented?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SOLMAN RFC READ ROLE
entry.content:
Hi customer,

Regarding your query, kindly let you know below:

As the name SAP_SOLMAN_READ_702  suggests, it is only for read purposes and should never contain write or admin. You mentioned write and admin authorizations in COPIED role. Customers can always copy roles and adjust them, but as per standard we do not ship these values for the authorization objects.

However the customer can copy the role and adjust authorizations.

Hope above help address your concern.

Sincerely,

SAP Support

entry.title: Evaluate Consolidated Manual Classification of SAP Users to Discover SAP License Potential Savings
entry.content:
Do you manage multiple SAP systems and have a measurement plan for SAP audits but haven't proactively analyzed whether your manual classification of SAP users aligns with your SAP license entitlement? With the SAM4U solution from SAP, this task becomes effortless, helping you maintain your SAP landscape within entitled SAP license boundaries.

How it works?

Install the SAM4U extractor from SAP in your SAP backend systems, gather data with almost one click, and enjoy consolidated analysis done by the SAM4U Tool.

Where to get SAM4U extractor?

The SAM4U Extractor is deployed into the customer's backend systems to extract data. Its functionality has been adapted (downported) for compatibility with release 7.31 and is distributed via SAP Note:
3292019 - SAM4U Data Extractor - SAP for Me

Which SAM4U KPI shows consolidated results of manual classification of SAP users?

Once you have uploaded data to the SAM4U tool and created a consolidation according to your SAP measurement plan, as shown in the example below:

 Pic.01. SAM4U Consolidation

You can access all SAM4U KPIs that are automatically filled with data based on the extracted information from SAP backends. A demo instance of the SAM4U Tool is always available on our website: Skybuffer

On the Dashboard, as well as in the Users Analytics section, you can find the “Classified Users” KPI, which displays the number of classified users for each type.

 Pic.02. SAM4U Tool – Classified Users KPI

By clicking on the chart, you can drill down to the list of users.

 Pic.03. SAM4U Tool – List of Users Assigned to a Certain Metric

In our example, you can see that 402 SAP users are classified as “SAP Bus. Suite Professional,” which is the most expensive type of license. Checking the License Consumption KPI in the SAM4U tool, we see that the number of “SAP Bus. Suite Professional” licenses purchased is less than the number of SAP users manually classified as professionals.

Pic.04. SAM4U Tool – License Consumption

Optimizing Manual Classification of SAP Users

Considering the spare licenses of other SAP user types, several options exist for optimizing the manual classification of SAP users to comply with SAP license entitlement:

  • Evaluate Manual Classifications: Use the SAM4U KPI “Classified/Dialog Users” from user analytics to ensure all users are manually classified. Automatically classified users are typically assigned the most expensive license type, so reviewing and reclassifying these users is essential.

  • Identify Dormant Users: Check the SAM4U users analytics for dormant users who might be locked and invalidated.

  • Analyze User Roles and Usage: Use the SAM4U tool to identify users whose roles and active usage do not justify their current classification, allowing for potential reclassification.

SAM4U Tool brings clarity and helps you reclassify SAP users effectively, ensuring proper SAP license consumption and unlocking potential cost savings.

Get familiar with the SAM4U tool available on our website: Skybuffer and keep reading our blogs.

P.S. Check out our entire blog series about the SAM4U tool here: SAM4U as a Service.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori - SAP Business Role Activation using Task-List SAP_FIORI_CONTENT_ACTIVATION
entry.content:
Thanks for taking the time to write the blog - this was just brought to my attention. 

I appreciate that this was some time ago, and some of the advice may reflect when this was written. 

Best practices and tooling capabilities frequently change over time so it's important to reference the correct information for your SAP S/4HANA release. Also you need to consider your architecture as tooling has been streamlined around the embedded FES (Fiori front-end server) architecture which has been the recommended architecture since December 2017.

For the benefit of others who find this, as a Fiori expert, I have some concerns around some of the advice here - as it's not aligned to best practice.  In particular, it is NOT best practice to activate the services separately before activating the business roles. That would usually be unnecessary double-handling.  The task list itself takes care of service activation and that is the recommended way to run it. 

Our best recommendation to avoid missteps and rework  is to check the latest official documentation for your SAP S/4HANA release at https://help.sap.com - search for product Fiori Launchpad then choose the documentation for your release and refer to the Administration guide.

entry.title: Self Service DVM Guidelines, Configuration, and Compatible Components
entry.content:
We are currently in discussion of enabling self-service DVM to our Solman system.

I would like to know if you could give us the pre-requisites, guidelines, configuration, and compatible components needed to assess if this is feasible to our current SAP landscape setup.

 

Also, can you also provide its effect once enable especially for system performance.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Self Service DVM Guidelines, Configuration, and Compa...
entry.content:
For legacy ERP systems, please refer to below KBA and attached pdf guide:
2035999 - FAQ: Automated DVM self-service documents / New DVM EWA chapter setup and creation

For HANA based systems like SAP S/4 HANA , EHP7+ for SAP ERP 6.0 on HANA, SAP BW/4 HANA,
please refer to steps in below KBA:
2716655 - How To Use the DVM Cloud Application - Step by Step guide

There is no known performance impact upon activation of DVM.

entry.title: On account posting for bank statement line items against Customer for open Items
entry.content:
How to post On account posting for bank statement line items against Customers for open Items using FEBAN in SAP HANA.
I have tried clearing customer line items using Reference Number XBLNR and Document Number BELNR.
I want to do the posting On Account.
Any configuration or search string or any Exit is to be applied for the same.

Example: One Customer has 10 Invoices with a value of 1,00,000, as per discussion with the Customer, at the time of Payment value of 60,000 they will maintain the Customer codes. When the same amount was reflected in our bank account, at the time of the statement update in SAP, the system found the customer code and post a entry with Customer A/c ---Cr. and Incoming Bank A/c....Dr.

Please suggest.

Hi Vasu_Sac,

entry.title: Re: Password Protect Zip file in SAP CPI
entry.content: Hello, Please note this functionality is not available as part of the standard solution. Note https://me.sap.com/notes/3296557/E contains more information on this. There may be other ways (opensource) to achieve this, but cannot be confirmed by SAP. Thanks, Kishan

entry.title: Can I dlete \usr\sap\<SID>\tmp*?
entry.content:
Solution Manager installation is complete. The \usr\sap\<SID(ABAP)>\tmp folder is 0 KB. However, the \usr\sap\<SID(JAVA)>\tmp folder is 8 GB. This is causing the drive where /usr/sap is located to become full. Can I dlete \usr\sap\<SID>\tmp*?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Can I dlete \usr\sap\<SID>\tmp*?
entry.content:
/tmp stands for temporary folder. Generally speaking, deleting these files or even the tmp folder will not harm system function.
However 8 GB is still a high number, please verify what files are stored there and whether any files specific to your own needs then decide to delete or not from your operation perspective.

Could you please guide me how to show custom field value in the report?

entry.title: Re: when performing a Status change in solman 7.2 the err...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Firstly, check if following SAP Notes are relevant and should be implemented in the affected solman system: 3308133 - F1Help window shows XSRF token not found error.
2803147 - Missing XSRF token when loading BSPWD_BASICS/F1HelpProxy.do
2798177 - XSRF enablement II
2795957 - Dump about "XSRF token" appears when navigating to Fiori by clicking Product ID

Secondly, if above SAP Notes don't help with the issue, contacting SAP Support for further assistance.

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Solution Manager 7.2 - Editing templates for System M...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

One way to find the missing authorization object is by accessing t-code SU53 after reproducing the error. Afterwards, use t-code SUIM to locate the role that contains the authorization object. If additional assistance is needed, please provide the screenshot in SU53 and the solman 7.2 SP version.

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: SAP RAP Unmanaged scenario example-Simplified
entry.content:
SAP RAP (ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model) has two main flavors: managed and unmanaged. Let's focus on the unmanaged version.

Unmanaged SAP RAP refers to a development approach where developers have more control over the data persistence and business logic compared to the managed approach. Here are some key aspects:

  1. Custom Logic: In unmanaged RAP, developers write their own custom logic for handling data retrieval, manipulation, and persistence. This gives more flexibility in how data is processed and stored.
  2. Direct Database Access: Developers can directly access the database tables and define their own data models using Core Data Services (CDS) views or ABAP classes.
  3. Explicit Service Definition: Unlike managed RAP, where service definitions are automatically generated based on annotations, unmanaged RAP requires developers to explicitly define service implementations and behaviors.
  4. Manual CRUD Operations: CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations need to be implemented explicitly in unmanaged RAP, giving full control over how data is managed.
  5. Integration with Existing Systems: Unmanaged RAP is often used when integrating with existing systems or when there is a need for complex business logic that cannot be easily handled by the managed approach.
  6. Flexibility: Developers have more freedom to implement complex validation rules, authorization checks, and other custom requirements directly in the application logic.

Overall, unmanaged SAP RAP provides a more hands-on approach to application development compared to the managed approach, allowing developers to leverage their expertise in ABAP programming and database handling while building modern RESTful APIs.

Top of Form

 

 

 

In this example, we will show a simple application for Employee build with RAP Unmanaged flavors.

 

Development steps.

 

To be summarized below object will be created for Unmanaged scenario.

 

 

Table ZT01_EMPLOYEE

 

 

 

Base CDS View Z_I_EMPLOYEES_U

 

 

 

Consumption CDS view  Z_C_EMPLOYEES_U

 

 

 

 

 

Behavior Definition

 

 

Bottom of Form

 

Behavior  definition

 

 

Implement the Create  method

 

 

Implement Update Method

 

Implement Delete Method

 

 

Implement Adjust_Numbers method.

 

Implement Save method.

 

 

Test

  1. Open the Application.

 

 

 2. Click on Create. Give Input value and Create.

 

 

3. New Record got created.

 

 

4. Select any Row , click on Edit.

 

 

5. Change the value and Save.

 

6. Record will be updated.

 

7. Select the Rows and click on Delete.

 

 

8. Records will be deleted.

 

 

9. In the Database table also you can see the records.

 

 

 

So, all the  CRUD operation is successful using RAP Unmanaged flavors.

entry.title: Re: Total value in purchase requisition
entry.content: Can you explain - Stuck in a loop little more

entry.title: Re: Hello,I want to show the "Text" field in Goods Moveme...
entry.content:
Hi 

Please try the below steps to resolve this issues .

To show a custom field like "Text" in the Goods Movement Analysis report from Post Goods Movement, you typically need to follow these general steps, which may vary slightly depending on the specific system or reporting tool you are using:

1. Identify the Data Source: Determine where the "Text" field is stored. It could be in a custom table, a structure, or an extension field linked to the goods movement document.

2. Enhance Data Source: If the "Text" field is not part of the standard data source used for the Goods Movement Analysis report, you may need to enhance the data source to include this field. This could involve: Adding the field to an existing data source.Creating a new data source that includes the required field.

3. Modify Report Layout: Once the data source includes the "Text" field, you need to modify the report layout to display this field. This involves:
Adding a column or section in the report layout where the "Text" field will appear.
Assigning the data binding of the new column/section to the corresponding field in the data source.

4. Test and Validate: After making these changes, thoroughly test the report to ensure that the "Text" field displays correctly and shows the expected values for each goods movement.

Example Steps (Generic Outline):

Step 1: Identify Field Location: Determine where the "Text" field is stored (e.g., custom table ZTABLE, structure YSTRUCTURE, extension field EXT_FIELD).

Step 2: Enhance Data Source
If necessary, enhance the existing data source (e.g., table/view/query used for the Goods Movement Analysis report) to include the "Text" field. This might involve ABAP development or using custom fields provided by your system.

Step 3: Modify Report Layout
Access the report layout design tool (e.g., SAP Crystal Reports, SAP Fiori Elements, SAP BW Query Designer).
Add a new column or section in the report layout where the "Text" field will be displayed.
Bind the newly added column/section to the "Text" field from the enhanced data source.

Step 4: Test and Validate
Execute the Goods Movement Analysis report.
Verify that the "Text" field appears correctly for each relevant goods movement entry.
Ensure that the values displayed are accurate and meaningful based on the logic you've implemented.

By following these steps and adapting them to your specific system and reporting tool, you should be able to successfully display custom field values like "Text" in the Goods Movement Analysis report from Post Goods Movement.

entry.title: Re: Can I dlete \usr\sap\<SID>\tmp*?
entry.content:
Hi 

Please try this 

Yes, you can delete the contents of the `\usr\sap\<SID>\tmp` folder to free up space on the drive.

1. Stop SAP Services: Ensure that all SAP services (both ABAP and JAVA stacks) are stopped before proceeding.

2. Delete Contents: Delete all files and folders within the `\usr\sap\<SID>\tmp` directory.

3. Restart SAP Services: After deleting the contents, restart your SAP services (both ABAP and JAVA stacks).

4. Monitor Disk Space: Monitor the disk space to ensure it has been freed up appropriately.

Deleting the contents of the `\usr\sap\<SID>\tmp` folder is safe and commonly done to reclaim disk space.

entry.title: Re: On account posting for bank statement line items agai...
entry.content:
Hi Please check the below find the steps to get some idea.

To post an On Account posting for bank statement line items against customers for open items using FEBAN in SAP HANA, you typically follow these steps:

1. Access FEBAN: Start transaction FEBAN in your SAP system to process bank statement line items.

2. Identify Customer Open Items: Find the bank statement line item that corresponds to the customer payment. The line item should ideally match the amount agreed upon with the customer.

3. Select Line Item: Select the bank statement line item that represents the customer payment.

4. Enter Posting Details:
Document Type: Enter the appropriate document type for the posting (e.g., DZ for customer invoices).
Posting Key: Use the posting key suitable for the transaction (e.g., 40 for customer credit, 50 for bank debit).
Customer Account: Enter the customer account to which the payment should be posted (e.g., KUNNR).
Amount: Enter the amount to be posted against the customer account.

5. Enter Reference Information:
Use the customer reference (e.g., Reference Number XBLNR or Document Number BELNR) to link the payment to the correct customer open item.

6. Save and Post: Save the transaction. The system will post the on-account entry against the customer account and the bank account as per your entry.

Configuration or Additional Information:

- Search String: FEBAN allows you to search for line items based on various criteria including amount, date, and text. Use these search options to locate the specific bank statement line item you need to process.

- User Exits or Enhancements: Typically, standard SAP functionality should cover the requirements for posting on-account entries in FEBAN. If specific customizations or validations are needed, consult with your SAP Basis or ABAP team to check if any enhancements are required.

Example Scenario:

In your example:
- Identify the bank statement line item corresponding to the received payment of 60,000.
- Use the customer's reference number (e.g., XBLNR) to link this payment to the open items in the customer account.
- Post the entry with the customer account credited and the bank account debited.

By following these steps in FEBAN and ensuring correct entry of document type, posting key, customer account, and reference information, you can successfully perform an On Account posting against customer open items in SAP HANA.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK flexible column in web view
entry.content: @sk_ramkumar What you are experiencing on web, that is the expected behavior.

entry.title: Re: On account posting for bank statement line items agai...
entry.content:
Additionally given sample scenario.

sample scenario to illustrate how to post an On Account posting for bank statement line items against customers using FEBAN in SAP HANA.

Scenario:

Background:
You have received a customer payment of 60,000 for invoices totaling 100,000. The customer has agreed to maintain a balance of 60,000 on account.

Steps to Post On Account using FEBAN:

1. Access FEBAN: Start transaction FEBAN in your SAP system.

2. Identify Bank Statement Line Item:
- Assume you have a bank statement line item that matches the customer payment of 60,000.

Example Bank Statement Line Item:
- Date: 2024-07-01
- Amount: 60,000
- Text: Customer payment for invoices

3. Enter Posting Details:
- Document Type: DZ (Customer payment)
- Posting Key: 40 (Customer credit)
- Customer Account: Enter the customer account (e.g., KUNNR)

4. Reference Information:
- Use the customer reference number (e.g., XBLNR) or document number (BELNR) from the customer's payment advice to link to the customer's open items.

Example Reference Information:
- XBLNR (Reference): Customer payment advice number
- BELNR (Document Number): Bank document number

5. Posting Example:
- Posting Key: 40 (Customer credit)
- Customer Account: 1000 (Customer account number)
- Amount: 60,000 (Amount to be posted against the customer account)

6. Save and Post:
- Save the transaction. The system will automatically post the entry:
- Customer Account (1000) credited with 60,000
- Bank Account (e.g., 120000) debited with 60,000

Note:
- Ensure the customer account number (KUNNR) and other details are correctly entered to accurately reflect the customer's open items.
- Use the customer's reference (XBLNR) or document number (BELNR) to maintain traceability between the bank statement entry and customer payment.
- Always verify the posting before saving to ensure accuracy in financial transactions.

This example outlines a typical process using FEBAN to handle on-account postings against customer open items in SAP HANA.

entry.title: To trigger mail to the external mail ids in workflow
entry.content:
Hi Community,

The requirement is to send an email to the external mail ids security department upon the initiation of a leave request, regardless of approval status & regardless of them present in the system as an employee. To achieve this, we need to include the specific person in the Workflow as a contributor.

Currently, in SuccessFactors, we can only add external email IDs as CCs, who receive notifications after approval. Please suggest if we can include external email IDs as contributors or can we send mail notifications to them even if they are not present in the system as employee.
Thanks.

entry.title: SAP Version 10. SAP started freezing often whenever the "Add" button was pressed on any window.
entry.content:
I would be glad if someone has encountered this or knows how to resolve it.

When the "Add" button is pushed on any window in any module, such as an inventory transfer (Inventory) or an invoice (SD), the pop-up window starts loading, & eventually it replies, "Could not connect to the database". SAP began to freeze repeatedly. This issue was persistent in the live database (HANA). Following a server restart, everything continued to function.

As this problem remained, I'm sure a restart will make it work once more. However, it is highly embarrassing for those clients who rely on SAP.

entry.title: Re: ISO XML file in Chinese language in public cloud
entry.content: Added Localization tag, please remove tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

entry.title: Re: Solman user SM<SID> is running SAPLSU_USER_CHANGE_DOC in sattelite system
entry.content: It is likely triggered by the CCDB extractors. Which can be checked in solution manager via t_cd CCDB.

entry.title: Re: CKMHELP - Material Ledger Help Desk Overview
entry.content:
Hello coleti

Have gone through so many text, pages and books, also SAP blogs. This could be one of best descriptive information I found on CKMHELP,

Many thanks sharing 

Good Luck

entry.title: Can we change the time range in message status overview - from 5:30 - 5:30 to 12:00 - 12:00
entry.content: The current filter criteria is restricted  to view accurate data for one whole  as it starts from 5:30. If we can get it displayed as 00:00 - 00:00 , it helps in retrieving data accurately per day. Kindly let me know if we can change it.

entry.title: Hello Gurus,
entry.content: We are having multiple plants under a one company code. We are having a customer order for product Z in plant B. But due to some lack of capacity or due to other reasons we want to manufacture the same product in plant A. Procurement type of product Z is F ( externally procured ) in plant B and E ( internally manufactured ) in plant A. Once we put the demand (sales order) in plant B and after MRP run the Purchase Requestion will be generated for product Z. After MRP run of plant B at the same time I want to auto generate planned order of product Z in plant A and dependent requirement of BOM components in plant A. Is there any configuration or settings which needs to be done in master data, please let me know and suggest the ways to go.

entry.title: Re: Transport Access
entry.content: Hi Bazis, Could you share the more details about your request?

entry.title: Re: Date not grouped in story with Datasphere model
entry.content:
@jlopezm 

I think just converting the string to date will not create the necessary hierarchies. I think you would need to create the SAP DS Time and Date dimension.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/understanding-time-tables-dimensions-in-an-sap-datasphere-world-my-1st-blog/ba-p/13569536

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/data-warehouse-cloud-graphical5-timetables..html

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Connecting Multiple Employee Central Instances to a Single SAP S/4HANA System for Employee Data
entry.content:
Hello Rodolfo,

This feature has been delivered in 1H 2024 for Employee Master Data. Please check the official help documentation for more details:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_EC_S4_HCM_INTEGRATION/ff6b495d894a4685accf7e4bfa75da1b/6e8ad91e770b48798a3af3469953578d.html?locale=en-US

Regards,

Paramita

entry.title: Re: Solution Manager 7.2 - Editing templates for System Monitoring
entry.content: Hello, In addition to SU53/SUIM recommendation - you may want to recheck technical administration role prerequisites mentioned in the Solution Manager security guide below: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/0043dbb640674d9bb916602fe2ec90e8/d6ffab0b98fc407ba5f26255bf5c1599.html. Regards, Kishan

entry.title: Re: Query Report Scheduler not supported in SAP B1 HANA ?
entry.content: Running SAP B1 Hana. From what I have seen there is no way to schedule a report. I use Crystal Reports and Smart Report Organizer to schedule and send

entry.title: Re: Query Report Scheduler not supported in SAP B1 HANA ?
entry.content: For Scheduling I use Crystal Reports, via Smart Report Organizer.

entry.title: Re: Transport Access
entry.content: Hello, I assume you are after the correct values for authorization object S_TRANSPRT. Please check help link https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw73ehp1/7.31.19/en-us/52/0e5ed7c03311d2851c0000e8a57770/frameset.htm to get the relevant values. 43 is the value required to release the transport. Regards, Kishan

entry.title: Re: 2024-07 Developer Challenge - Task 0 - Server and service provisioning
entry.content:
Love the one liner to create a cap app and deploy to cloud foundry 🙂

https://neelames-simplest-deployment.cfapps.eu11.hana.ondemand.com/

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK flexible column in web view
entry.content: Thanks @Jitendra_Kansal.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK flexible column in web view
entry.content: Is there any way to change the CSS in web view ?

entry.title: Populate new values to # and not updating existing booked values
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

Please help us to achieve the below requirement.

We have audit trail dimension. Members – S4 & # (Unassigned).

There is a transaction value of 100 for Audit trail S4. And no value for #.

We have an input template in which the table won’t have audit trail as row / column. (due to other dimensions constrain). Now the above mentioned 100 will be displayed and the requirement is when the user changes the value from 100 to 150, the additional value (50) should be going to # audit trail. How to achieve this? 

 

Thank you in advance

 

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Extend Reuse Component in Adaptation Project
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement to add variant management in reuse component used in adaptation of manage sourcing application

To describe it in detail:

I have created an adaptation project from manage sourcing application which uses reuse component container "sap.cus.sd.lib.item.cndn.forSmartElements::SrcgProjItmCndnAmount::ComponentContainer" to show condition data.

In the smart table used in this container there is not variant management used. However I have requirement to add smartVaraint property of smart table .

I have added below code in object Page Controller extension method attachBatchRequestCompleted

if (!this.oConditionsComponent) {
                            var sComponentId = "s2p.mm.pur.srcgproj.maintains1::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage.view.Details::SourcingProjectItem--sap.cus.sd.lib.item.cndn.forSmartElements::SrcgProjItmCndnAmount::ComponentContainer";
                            this.oConditionsComponent = sap.ui.getCore().byId(sComponentId);
                            this.oConditionTable =  this.oConditionsComponent.getComponentInstance().mAggregations.rootControl.mAggregations.content[0].mAggregations.items[3]
                            this.oConditionTable.setProperty("useVariantManagement",true);
                            this.oConditionTable.setProperty("showVariantManagement",true);
                        this.oConditionsComponent.getComponentInstance().load(true);
                     

Still the default standard variant is not shown in smart table. While checking on console both the properties are set to true. 

So I have a question that can we extend or change any property of reuse Component in Adaptation Project?

Thanks in Advance.

Regards,

Riya

entry.title: RAP Managed Scenario - Is it possible to make key fields editable during copy action?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have implemented factory action for "copy". When a record is selected and clicked on "copy" action, object page opens with all the non-key fields in edit mode except key fields. Key fields appear with '-'

I want the key fields in edit mode either empty or the same value from copied record so that I can maintain them.

Need help how to achieve my requirement.

 

 

 

 

METHOD copy.

    DATA it_selected_records    TYPE TABLE FOR CREATE Z_MATERIAL.   "Instance of the BO entity

    " remove travel instances with initial %cid (i.e., not set by caller API)

    READ TABLE keys WITH KEY %cid = '' INTO DATA(key_with_inital_cid).
    ASSERT key_with_inital_cid IS INITIAL.

    " read the data from the Material instances(selected record(s) for copy)

    READ ENTITIES OF Z_MATERIAL IN LOCAL MODE
      ENTITY mat_data
       ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
    RESULT DATA(material_read_result)
    FAILED failed.

    LOOP AT material_read_result ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<material>).

      " fill in Material container for creating new Material instance

      APPEND VALUE #( %cid      = keys[ KEY entity %key = <material>-%key ]-%cid
                      %is_draft = keys[ KEY entity %key = <material>-%key ]-%param-%is_draft
                      %data     = CORRESPONDING #( <material>  EXCEPT Plant Material )
                   )
        TO it_selected_records ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<new_record>).

      " adjust the copied Material instance data

      "" ChangedOn must be Current date and ChangedBy must be Current User

      <new_record>-ChangedOn     = cl_abap_context_info=>get_system_date( ).

      <new_record>-ChangedBy     = cl_abap_context_info=>get_user_technical_name( ).

    ENDLOOP.

    " create new BO instance
    MODIFY ENTITIES OF Z_MATERIAL IN LOCAL MODE
      ENTITY mat_data
        CREATE FIELDS (
                        Plant
                        Material
                        ObjectID
DeletionIndicator
                        ProfitCenter
                        BaseQuantity
                        Production Time  )
          WITH it_selected_records
      MAPPED DATA(mapped_create)
      FAILED DATA(failed_create)
      REPORTED DATA(reported_create).

    READ ENTITIES OF Z_MATERIAL IN LOCAL MODE
      ENTITY mat_data
      ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( mapped_create-mat_data )
      RESULT DATA(read_created_result).

    " set the new BO instances
    mapped-mat_data   =  mapped_create-mat_data .

  ENDMETHOD.

 

 

 

Regards

Srividhya

entry.title: Can we ignore Data locks for specific Data action.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

Is there a way to bypass data locks for specific data actions?

My exact scenario is, I have enabled data locks for period 2025 for budget. Now I need to do one calculation for the same period and version using Data action. And there is another Data action B where I need to perform another calculation logic only for the open period. Can we somehow configure data action A to run on locked period? 

 

thank you in advance

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: MASS movement type 562
entry.content:
Hi,

How Can I do mass 562 movement type in a one time.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: MASS movement type 562
entry.content:
In S/4HANA Cloud there is no application to mass post goods movements. You may consider using following APIs as workaround:

ODATA API API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/3f57e7df4a114edabffe8b2d581a59ed/1aef4e402acd4c8b8ec2ea2bfda7715b.html?locale=en-US

SOAP API MaterialDocumentCreateRequest_Async_In:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/3f57e7df4a114edabffe8b2d581a59ed/3fe61a3650e343c8bd1a09132d667c57.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: How to activate CLT in several created projects is possible
entry.content:
Hi Dario,

this is still an early adopter feature restricted to limited customers. Please reach out to your SAP contact to apply for the program .

Once your application is reviewed and approved you will have the option to request the feature to be activated in the required projects via support service.

This step is manual and can't be performed on your end as self service configuration toggle.

Regards,

Lucian

entry.title: Re: To-Many Relationship using CDS , SAP CAP
entry.content:
Deep inserts work differently whether you use Associations or Compositions, see here: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/providing-services#deep-reads-writes

In your example you're trying to do a deep insert with an association to entities which don't exist yet. Hence it fails. Either work with compositions, or decouple the creation of the entities in 2 separate calls.

entry.title: Re: GAL unit of measure is missing in ECTR BOMs
entry.content:
Hallo Allen,

this is an internal table which is returned&send in a function module.

Please navigate up in stateless.txt to the function module which is called. You can set a breakpoint and then debug it and see, where the data comes from to get to the root and real DB table.

Hope this helps.

Regards,

Gerhard

entry.title: Re: Security Deposits Suppliers - Best Practice
entry.content: Added Finance tag, please remove tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

entry.title: Re: Gateway Timeout CAP application - is there a paramete...
entry.content:
Hi Daniel,

I experienced the exact same scenario a few days ago: a long running backend task, but Fiori didn't want to wait and threw the error after 30 seconds.

I tried the same `HTML5.Timeout` setting and a first test showed it didn't work. However, I kept the setting there, and the next day it suddenly worked.

So I think it comes down to some caching in the inner workings of the managed approuter. Try with a full redeployment, give it some time, and eventually it will abide by your setting.

entry.title: Re: Unable to login Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Hi @inventrax,

I am also facing same issue. Landing to login page and after giving credentials its same page.
No any error at console or network also.

if your issue solved can you tell the steps please?

Thanks & Regards,
Ashutosh

entry.title: Re: what are the difference between resource from APQC, value accelerator and Process navigator
entry.content:
APQC provides Process Reference Frameworks for various industries which you can use to build your own Business Process Architecture. The SAP Reference Architecture by the way have references to the APQC Framework.

Process Navigator contains SAP specific Best Practices (Scope Items) and some Scope Items provide Solution Process Flows as BPMN Diagrams.

Value Accelerator is just a generic term to encompasses all asset types.

entry.title: Re: Scope Item not selectable in Central Business Configuration
entry.content:
Hi Dario,

scenario Intercompany Financial Posting (1GP) was not released in this content version for self service selection by the responsible content team .

Please follow the note 3122430 - Scope item activation request for SAP Central Business Configuration provisioned S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

and request the selection of this scenario in the project scop as service request .

You can check the selection options for each scenario in the accelerator Availability and dependencies of solution processes 

Regards,

Lucian

entry.title: Re: Fiori app deployed to BTP ABAP environment gets "403 blocked by UCON" error
entry.content:
Hi @wobauer1,

For me the issue was fixed logging out (or opening the url in an incognito window) and logging in with my SAP Universal ID's main e-mail adress.

Hope this helps,

Kind regards,

Julian

entry.title: Re: Any possibility for extension of Old Project Billing cut off date.?
entry.content: Added Project tag, please remove tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

entry.title: Re: GST Health Check - India
entry.content: Added Localization tag, please remove other tags.

entry.title: S/4 HANA - filter requirements in MRP with MD_ADD_ELEMENTS
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

In ECC we have used BADI: CHANGE_MDPSX_VBBE to be able to filter the requirements based on customer number where planning data should not be created by the MRP and should not be shown in the stock/requirement list.

We have learned that this BADI is not called in S/4 HANA and is to be replaced with MD_ADD_ELEMENTS. We are using the HANA optimized classic MRP.

Our problem is that ch_copy_mdpsx is not having any fields with sales order related information, therefore we can not implement the same logic we had in the past in CHANGE_MDPSX_VBBE, where we were able to do the filtering based on the VBBE entries.

Can you please help us how this can be done with MD_ADD_ELEMENTS?

Thanks in advance.

Tporczio

entry.title: Re: How to change default values in App Manage Incoming Payment Files (F1680)
entry.content: Added Finance tag, please remove tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

entry.title: Re: add new items to an existing outbound delivery
entry.content:
Hey,

To solve the problem we used the BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE and NEW_ITEM_DATA. We found out that that the reference to the SO doc was missing. We added an enhancement where the missing values were filled.

Here's an example:

entry.title: Re: Approach to identify and remove duplicates from SAP ECC & CRM applications
entry.content: Please remove tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: In Subscription Billing, for monthly recurring charge, how to apply different rates on quantities?
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We want to implement a use case where Monthly recurring Charge to be applied with multiple rate options. Below are the use cases,

  1. A Monthly recurring rate of 10 $ to be applied on 20 entities & a rate of 5 $ to be applied on 10 entities.
  2. A Monthly recurring rate of 10 $ to be applied on 20 entities & a rate of "50% of base rate(10 $)" to be applied on 10 entities.

How this can be achieved in Subscription Billing? Please share your suggestion for the solution.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SSAM2310 Measurment Documents full load in each delta...
entry.content:
Hello @muhammad_rafay ,

thank you for the fast response.

The Notes are looking correct for us - but it seams that all of them are not for our release:

Note

valid for

Our Release

3444431

S4Core 107 SP03

S4Core 107 SP02

3401678

S4Core 107 SP03

S4Core 107 SP02

3190709

S4FND 106

S4FND 107

Can you tell us which possibilities we have in that case?

 

Regards

Björn

entry.title: Re: SSAM2310 Measurment Documents full load in each delta...
entry.content: Hello Muhammad

entry.title: Copying goals from another goal plan
entry.content:
Hi,

I have an issue with the feature: Copy from another plan. this Feature is activated although the TGM/ CDP Goal transfer Wizard is disabled.

Once the manager tries to add a goal to the current goal plan in the form he gets this 3 options include the one Select from goal plan:

Does anyone know what else I should check or how I should disable it?

Thanks,

Lilach

entry.title: Re: display full names in order of first name and last name
entry.content: Mistake.

entry.title: Change Onboarding 2.0 NZ Compliance form field access
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Anyone know if we can change the NZ KS2 compliance form address field access / permission to allow Onboardee to Edit? The city and postal code are mandatory field in the form, if Onboardee didn't fill the address information during personal data collection, the field will be empty and unable to complete the form.

Regards,

Lika

entry.title: Re: display full names in order of first name and last name
entry.content: The employee's name as it appears on the Business Partner Management screen will be in the first name → last name order. Is it possible to change this to last name → first name order? Thanks for commenting.

entry.title: DMEEX FI_PAYMEDIUM_SAMPLE_41 Exit how to not delete spaces in between nodes?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

 

I am currently working on a DMEEX object where it will download the xml to AL11 after successful execute in F110. Hence the usage of FI_PAYMEDIUM_SAMPLE_41. however, t_file_output of said FM takes out the space at the end of each index. 
As seen on the screenshot, expected output should be "<Nm>test ACE 4 INC</Nm>" but due to the last char for row 2 being space, it removes the space and make the output <Nm>testACE 4 INC</Nm>.

I've tested different scenarios and it definitely affects rows that would end in space. removing it completely.

Any suggestions on what I can do to make it work?

Thank you

entry.title: App for download attachments invoices in mass
entry.content: Is there an app where we can download the attachments of several invoices at the same time, without having to search invoice by invoice?

entry.title: CAP: How can I add custom query options in my custom handler?
entry.content:
I need to retrieve all entries from my HANA DB entity with temporal aspect, so also the 'invalid' ones. I was hoping a CQN query like this should work, but only the 'valid' entries are retrieved from the database:

    public async getTemporalFactors(id:Array<string>){
        const service = await cds.connect.to('CO2SC3Service');
        const cqn = {
            SELECT: {
                from: { ref: ['TransportFactors'] },
                'sap-valid-from': [{ val: '1970-01-01' }]
            }
        };
        return await service.run(cqn);
    }

I tried this because I noticed you can add these parameters for external oData services: August 2022 | cap≽ire (cloud.sap)

Ideally I want to change the req.query parameter in my on Read handler, to add the sap-valmid-from parameter.

entry.title: Re: edge pop-up text: the webpage you are viewing is trying to close the tab.
entry.content: i have the same issue, any solution so far?
